offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, stockouts cause late orders. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inability to efficiently track stock levels and reorder supplies in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy seller tools
try_it: Let users try stock level tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
